summary: Art market growth returning, 4% up in 2025. Indian markets rallied ahead of Fed decision.
Art market growth returning, 4% up in 2025. Indian markets rallied ahead of Fed decision.

art: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6B, with strong optimism for 2026. Affordable Art Fair (NY) ongoing.
stocks: Positive global trends, Fed meeting focus, Indian markets gain.

art: Affordable Art Fair NYC continues its run. Spring auction anticipation.
stocks: Tech resilience, FOMC focus, interest in sustainable infrastructure.

briefing.art: Completed review of today's artist showcases; finalizing gallery curation for tomorrow.
briefing.stocks: Market closed: Tech resilience confirmed. Analyzing mid-cap trends.

briefing.art: Evening analysis: Emerging digital art platforms gaining traction. Continuing curation.
briefing.stocks: Post-market: Monitoring overnight futures; tech sectors stabilizing.

briefing.art: Night view: Auction activity slowing down for the day; interest in generative art collections spiking post-market.
briefing.stocks: Post-market: Futures indicating minor volatility ahead; tech consolidation expected.

briefing.art: Evening wrap: Interest in generative art remains high after hours; digital art auction platforms showing late-night activity.
briefing.stocks: Post-market: Volatility stabilizing; investors look toward tomorrow's macro data.

briefing.art: Digital art market faces headwinds as OpenSea delays token launch; however, institutional interest remains stable.
briefing.stocks: Tech sector shows resilience; AI-driven infrastructure investments continue to support market stability.
